coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Easy spinning. Just don't fall asleep.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Active recovery enhances blood flow and promotes adaptation.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Low-intensity active recovery facilitates lactate clearance.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Keep it easy and enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Max power. All-out. Your pain receptors are about to get very busy.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Peak neuromuscular power. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Maximal neuromuscular recruitment develops fast-twitch fiber recruitment.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Accelerate hard. Max cadence, max power. No holding back.
